title: rungia paucinervia
intro: Rungia paucinervia, also known as Khas, is a type of plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in the Himalayan region of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, and is used to alleviate symptoms of fever, diarrhea, and dysentery. The health benefits of Rungia paucinervia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help reduce inflammation and fight off infections in the body. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
